info.name: Hornvin Ecosystem - COMPLETE API Suite
info.description: Combined collection of all Hornvin API modules (Admin, Distributor, Customer, Garage, Auth)

request.description: Create a new Admin account. Returns an accessToken (token) for immediate authentication. Admins have full access to the dashboard.
Register a new Distributor. Returns an accessToken (token). Requires business details and region. In development, OTP is logged to the server console.

response.name: Success
Success

request.description: Register a new Garage. Returns an accessToken (token). Required fields: name, businessName, phoneNumber, garageType, email, password. In development, OTP is logged to console.

response.name: Success
Success

request.description: Register a new Customer. Returns an accessToken (token). Simple registration requiring name, email, phone, and password.

response.name: Success
Success
